ul.li: Memory Ordering: Fields are transmitted in Big-Endian (Network Byte Order).
IHL (Internet Header Length): 4-bit field. Value is number of 32-bit words. Min=5 (20B), Max=15 (60B).
Total Length: 16-bit field. Max packet size = 65,535 bytes.
Fragmentation: Fragment Offset is measured in 8-byte blocks (64 bits).
Cache Performance: 20-byte header fits entirely within a single 64B L1 Cache Line.
